build.buildCommand: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --prod=false && pnpm --filter @workspace/strapi run build && rm -rf artifacts/strapi/public/uploads-seed && cp -r artifacts/strapi/public/uploads artifacts/strapi/public/uploads-seed

deploy.startCommand: node artifacts/strapi/scripts/seed-uploads.mjs && NODE_ENV=production pnpm --filter @workspace/strapi run start
